texts: The presence of Arctic Char in the lake in the 1990s

texts: A description of the fishlife found in Lough Derg

elements.name: Text
texts: Arctic Char (Salvelinus alpinus), a threatened Red Data Book species, was recorded from [Lough Derg] as recently 1990/91.
